message: Ci: Add web publish workflow for binaries and GHCR image

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,200 @@
+name: Publish web artifacts
+
+on:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      tag:
+        description: "Release tag (format: web-vX.Y.Z)"
+        required: true
+        type: string
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - "web-v*"
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+  packages: write
+
+jobs:
+  meta:
+    name: Resolve release metadata
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    outputs:
+      tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
+      version: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}
+      ref: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.ref }}
+      image: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.image }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Resolve tag, version, and image name
+        id: meta
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+
+          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
+            TAG="${{ inputs.tag }}"
+          else
+            TAG="${{ github.ref_name }}"
+          fi
+
+          if [[ ! "$TAG" =~ ^web-v.+$ ]]; then
+            echo "Expected tag format: web-vX.Y.Z. Received: $TAG"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          VERSION="${TAG#web-v}"
+          OWNER_LOWER="$(echo "${{ github.repository_owner }}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"
+          IMAGE="ghcr.io/${OWNER_LOWER}/agentlogs"
+
+          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "ref=refs/tags/$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          echo "image=$IMAGE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+  build-binaries:
+    name: Build standalone binary (${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }})
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: meta
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - platform: linux
+            arch: x64
+          - platform: linux
+            arch: arm64
+          - platform: darwin
+            arch: x64
+          - platform: darwin
+            arch: arm64
+          - platform: windows
+            arch: x64
+          - platform: windows
+            arch: arm64
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ needs.meta.outputs.ref }}
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: 1.3.10
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts --filter ./packages/shared --filter ./packages/web
+
+      - name: Build standalone binary
+        env:
+          BUN_BINARY_TARGET: ${{ matrix.platform }}
+          BUN_BINARY_ARCH: ${{ matrix.arch }}
+        run: bun run --filter ./packages/web build
+
+      - name: Package binary artifact
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+
+          SRC="packages/web/dist/agentlogs-web"
+          EXT=""
+          if [[ "${{ matrix.platform }}" == "windows" ]]; then
+            SRC="${SRC}.exe"
+            EXT=".exe"
+          fi
+
+          OUT_DIR="release-assets"
+          OUT_NAME="agentlogs-web-${{ needs.meta.outputs.version }}-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}${EXT}"
+          mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"
+          cp "$SRC" "$OUT_DIR/$OUT_NAME"
+          chmod +x "$OUT_DIR/$OUT_NAME" || true
+
+      - name: Upload binary artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: binary-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}
+          path: release-assets/*
+          if-no-files-found: error
+
+  publish-docker:
+    name: Build and publish Docker image
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: meta
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: ${{ needs.meta.outputs.ref }}
+
+      - name: Setup QEMU
+        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3
+
+      - name: Setup Docker Buildx
+        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
+
+      - name: Login to GHCR
+        uses: docker/login-action@v3
+        with:
+          registry: ghcr.io
+          username: ${{ github.actor }}
+          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+      - name: Build and push image
+        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
+        with:
+          context: .
+          file: packages/web/Dockerfile
+          platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
+          push: true
+          tags: |
+            ${{ needs.meta.outputs.image }}:${{ needs.meta.outputs.version }}
+            ${{ needs.meta.outputs.image }}:latest
+
+  create-release:
+    name: Create GitHub release
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs:
+      - meta
+      - build-binaries
+      - publish-docker
+    steps:
+      - name: Download binary artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          pattern: binary-*
+          merge-multiple: true
+          path: release-assets
+
+      - name: Generate checksum files
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          cd release-assets
+
+          mapfile -t FILES < <(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -name 'agentlogs-web-*' -printf '%f\n' | sort)
+          if [[ "${#FILES[@]}" -eq 0 ]]; then
+            echo "No binaries found in release-assets"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          md5sum "${FILES[@]}" > checksums.md5
+          sha256sum "${FILES[@]}" > checksums.sha256
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          tag_name: ${{ needs.meta.outputs.tag }}
+          name: AgentLogs web v${{ needs.meta.outputs.version }}
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
+          files: |
+            release-assets/agentlogs-web-*
+            release-assets/checksums.md5
+            release-assets/checksums.sha256
+          body: |
+            Published web server artifacts for `${{ needs.meta.outputs.tag }}`.
+
+            Docker image:
+            - `${{ needs.meta.outputs.image }}:${{ needs.meta.outputs.version }}`
+            - `${{ needs.meta.outputs.image }}:latest`
+
+            Checksums:
+            - `checksums.md5` (legacy tooling compatibility)
+            - `checksums.sha256` (recommended)
